project:
weclome to it's just lava.

use wasd or the arrow keys to move.

you can also use space to jump if you prefer.

when you're ready, move to the green square to your right.
(you can press alt+backspace at any time to come back)

you can double jump at any time.

feel free to roam around.

you can also jump and move at the same time.
as you've probably noticed, the controls are very slippery.
also lava hurts. it takes you back to the start of the level.
be careful, and use micro movements by tapping the keys lightly to adjust your jumps.
hold on; where did the finish go?

up there ^

the camera will follow you.
don't worry though, you'll get very good at it soon.
time to put everything you've learned to the test.

remember; be patient, don't hesitate, and remember:

the lava is rising.
remember, you can retake the tutorial at any time by pressing alt+backspace
